channel.title: Chapter 1 on Perguntas Rápidas de Biologia
channel.description: Recent content in Chapter 1 on Perguntas Rápidas de Biologia

item.title: Chapter 1-1
item.description: --- primary_color: orange secondary_color: lightgray text_color: black shuffle_questions: false --- ### Select your superpower! There exist many superpowers in the world but one of them is better than everything else. Do you find it? 1. [ ] Enhanced Strength 1. [ ] Levitation 1. [x] Shapeshifting > Correct. This the best superpower!
